---
title: Single Cell Expression Atlas
alias: &ALIAS singlecellatlas
href: https://www.ebi.ac.uk/gxa/sc/home
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  include:
    categories: *ALIAS
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

---

## Overview

The Single Cell Expression Atlas (EMBL-EBI) provides curated single-cell RNA-seq gene expression data across species and tissues with interactive exploration tools.

## Key Features

- Curates and reanalyzes public single-cell RNA-seq datasets with uniform processing pipelines
- Supports multiple species including human, mouse, zebrafish, and other model organisms
- Provides interactive heatmaps and t-SNE/UMAP plots for gene and cell type exploration
- Integrates with bulk Expression Atlas for multi-resolution expression comparisons
- Enforces MAGE-TAB metadata standards for experimental annotation

## Use Cases in Research

- Comparing single-cell gene expression across tissues and species for conserved infection responses
- Identifying cell type-specific expression of AMR-related genes across organisms
- Accessing uniformly processed scRNA-seq data for integration with in-house datasets
- Exploring immune cell heterogeneity in disease models relevant to microbiome interactions
- Generating gene expression hypotheses for validation in wet lab experiments

## Getting Started

Visit [Single Cell Expression Atlas](https://www.ebi.ac.uk/gxa/sc/home) to access the database.

## Related Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
